doubleEscapeCommand.description: Optional extension command name to invoke on empty-editor double-escape. Accepts either 'anycopy' or '/anycopy'.

commandRemap.description: Map of submitted slash command names to replacement command names. Keys and values may include a leading '/'; runtime normalization trims whitespace and strips the slash.

fixedEditor.description: Optional fixed editor config. Disabled by default; opt in globally or per project.

editorChromeConfig.description: Editor chrome style config. Defaults to classic; amp is opt-in.

style.description: Editor chrome style. 'classic' preserves the current editor chrome; 'amp' uses rounded Amp-style editor borders in normal and fixed-editor mode, moves path/git status to the bottom border, keeps other enabled status in the top border, keeps an empty frame when statusBar.enabled is false, and falls back to classic lines in very narrow terminals.

respectGitignore.description: Hide files ignored by .gitignore when browsing.

skipHidden.description: Hide dotfiles and hidden directories in the picker.

allowFolderSelection.description: Allow folders to be queued and inserted as @path/ refs.

skipPatterns.description: Directory or file name patterns skipped by the picker.

tabCompletionMode.description: How Tab completes file-picker queries. 'segment' advances one path segment at a time; 'bestMatch' replaces the query with the strongest scoped fuzzy match.

previewHighlightMode.description: How the preview pane highlights source code. 'native' uses the local syntect addon with builtin fallback; 'builtin' always uses Pi's JS highlighter.

statusBarSegmentId.description: Status bar segment id. Include 'caveman' in custom segment arrays to show the active /caveman indicator.

showThinkingLevel.description: Show the current thinking level next to the model name when the model supports reasoning.

mode.description: How to render the current working directory in the path segment.

maxLength.description: Maximum path length when using abbreviated mode.

statusBarSeparatorText.description: Literal separator text inserted between visible status bar segments. May be empty.

statusBarColorValue.description: Either a Pi theme color name or a #RRGGBB hex color.

enabled.description: Render a powerline-style status bar in the editor's top border.

preset.description: Base status bar preset. Custom segment arrays inherit separator/colors/options from this preset.

leftSegments.description: Optional ordered list of segment ids to render on the left side of the status bar. When omitted, the preset default is used. Include 'caveman' to show the active /caveman indicator in custom layouts.

rightSegments.description: Optional ordered list of segment ids to render on the right side of the status bar. When omitted, the preset default is used. Include 'caveman' to show the active /caveman indicator in custom layouts.

fixedEditorShortcutList.description: Keyboard shortcut or shortcuts accepted by Pi key matching, e.g. super+up or ctrl+shift+up.

fixedEditorConfig.description: Fixed editor mode config for pieditor. Do not enable with pi-powerline-footer's fixed editor mode because both own terminal split composition.

enabled.description: Opt in to fixed editor mode. Runtime command /pieditor fixed-editor [on|off|toggle|status] changes the live runtime and saves this value globally; project .pi/pieditor.json overrides still win on the next load.

mouseScroll.description: Allow mouse wheel scrolling in fixed editor mode when enabled.

scrollUpShortcuts.description: Shortcut or shortcuts that scroll the fixed editor viewport up.

scrollDownShortcuts.description: Shortcut or shortcuts that scroll the fixed editor viewport down.
